TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Qngqaya_Cinun, title = Qngqaya_Cinun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qngqaya_Cinun} }

S.FORM: Qngqaya Cinun ÁĻĒŚłÉŚ∑•ŚÖ∑ Tunan Truku sbiyaw o spagan qabang ka babaw dxgal, kiya do psaan dha babaw snpagan qabang ka ubung, tluunghiya ka kuyuh Truku, mangal wahu. Qaya cinun o saw nii, 1.ubung,snalu qhuni, djiyun tminun. 2.qataq , snalu qhuni,djiyunmslagu waray cinun. 3.knisul(kusut),snalu djima,djiyun dhug waray. 4.buji(sntruma)snalu djima, djiyun daqut matas. 5.bgiya, snalu qhuni, djiyun ptasil waray. 6. kikut, snalu djima,djiyun pskrut tninun . 7.gikus, snalu djima,djiyun peaway waray tminun.. 8.wahug cinun ,tnunan waray nuqih, , djiyun pskrut haut hwihuk. 9.jisayan , snalu qhuni,djiyun psbkug waray psaun ubung. . 10.ciyadan , snalu djima,djiyun snuyuk nuqih . 11.surul , snalu buut samat, djiyun psdhug ciyadan smuyuk nuqih . 12.bluhing , snalu djima, djiyun psaan waray nuqih. 13.gluq walu snalu kahat walu, djiyun psdhriq waray nuqih . 14.dowsan snalu djima, djiyun msbkug waray. 15.daus, snalu qhuni,djiyun maqaxwaray. 16.smlaan, snalu djima, djiyun pdangaw waray pdaun bgiya.
S.PHON: qŇčqaja ¶inun **** tunan t…ĺuku sbijaw o spagan qabaŇč ka babaw dxgal, kija do psaan dńßa babaw snpagan qabaŇč ka ubuŇč, tluuŇčńßija ka kujuńß t…ĺuku, maŇčal wańßu. qaja ¶inun o saw nii, *.ubuŇč,snalu qńßuni, d…üijun tminun. *.qataq , snalu qńßuni,d…üijunmslagu wa…ĺaj ¶inun. *.knisul(kusut),snalu d…üima,d…üijun dńßug wa…ĺaj. *.bu…üi(snt…ĺuma)snalu d…üima, d…üijun daqut matas. *.bgija, snalu qńßuni, d…üijun ptasil wa…ĺaj. *. kikut, snalu d…üima,d…üijun psk…ĺut tninun . *.gikus, snalu d…üima,d…üijun p…ôawaj wa…ĺaj tminun.. *.wańßug ¶inun ,tnunan wa…ĺaj nuqińß, , d…üijun psk…ĺut ńßaut ńßwińßuk. *.…üisajan , snalu qńßuni,d…üijun psbkug wa…ĺaj psaun ubuŇč. . **. ¶ijadan , snalu d…üima,d…üijun snujuk nuqińß . **.su…ĺul , snalu buut samat, d…üijun psdńßug ¶ijadan smujuk nuqińß . **.bluńßiŇč , snalu d…üima, d…üijun psaan wa…ĺaj nuqińß. **.gluq walu snalu kańßat walu, d…üijun psdńß…ĺiq wa…ĺaj nuqińß . **.dowsan snalu d…üima, d…üijun msbkug wa…ĺaj. **.daus, snalu qńßuni,d…üijun maqaxwa…ĺaj. **.smlaan, snalu d…üima, d…üijun pdaŇčaw wa…ĺaj pdaun bgija.
S.FORM: Qngqaya Cinun ÁĻĒŚłÉŚ∑•ŚÖ∑ Tunan Truku sbiyaw o spagan qabang ka babaw dxgal, kiya do psaan dha babaw snpagan qabang ka ubung, tluunghiya ka kuyuh Truku, mangal wahu. Qaya cinun o saw nii, 1.ubung,snalu qhuni, djiyun tminun. 2.qataq , snalu qhuni,djiyunmslagu waray cinun. 3.knisul(kusut),snalu djima,djiyun dhug waray. 4.buji(sntruma)snalu djima, djiyun daqut matas. 5.bgiya, snalu qhuni, djiyun ptasil waray. 6. kikut, snalu djima,djiyun pskrut tninun . 7.gikus, snalu djima,djiyun peaway waray tminun.. 8.wahug cinun ,tnunan waray nuqih, , djiyun pskrut haut hwihuk. 9.jisayan , snalu qhuni,djiyun psbkug waray psaun ubung. . 10.ciyadan , snalu djima,djiyun snuyuk nuqih . 11.surul , snalu buut samat, djiyun psdhug ciyadan smuyuk nuqih . 12.bluhing , snalu djima, djiyun psaan waray nuqih. 13.gluq walu snalu kahat walu, djiyun psdhriq waray nuqih . 14.dowsan snalu djima, djiyun msbkug waray. 15.daus, snalu qhuni,djiyun maqaxwaray. 16.smlaan, snalu djima, djiyun pdangaw waray pdaun bgiya.
